summary: Backend and frontend smoke-tested for BharathMAT. All 5 backend cases pass (text analysis, image URL analysis via Claude vision, empty content 400, invalid URL 400, GET /api/analyses list). Frontend loads, header/badge/disclaimer/empty-state visible, tab switching works, full text-analysis flow renders risk-card (HIGH RISK), animated confidence bar (95%), summary, 3 red flags, recommendation, generate report + download-pdf button, and responsive at 375px. LLM (claude-sonnet-4-6) returning valid schema.
passed: POST /api/analyze text=sensational claim -> 200 with valid schema (risk=High, confidence=95, exactly 3 red_flags, summary+recommendation+created_at present)
POST /api/analyze image=Unsplash URL -> 200 valid schema (risk=Medium, confidence=62, 3 red_flags) — Claude vision base64 pipeline works
POST /api/analyze image=invalid URL -> 400 with helpful detail
Landing page shows 'Bharat Election Media Intelligence', 'ELECTION SAFETY' badge, disclaimer
Empty state visible with correct copy 'Paste an election-related image URL or text claim to begin'
Default tab is image-url-input; tab-text switches to textarea and back
Text analyze flow: loading-state -> risk-card (HIGH RISK), confidence-bar+value (95%), summary-card, red-flag-0/1/2, recommendation-card
generate-report-btn reveals report-section with Date/Input Type/Risk Level/Confidence/Summary/Warning Signs/Recommendation and download-pdf-btn
Responsive at 375x800 — layout intact, risk-card visible
notes: Two initial script checks reported False but are false negatives: (a) header uses 'AI-POWERED MEDIA RISK ASSESSMENT' (test looked for exact 'AI Risk Assessment'); (b) report labels are UPPERCASE (DATE, RISK LEVEL, etc.), visible in screenshot. Both are cosmetic/case differences, not bugs.
